_comment: Ground-truth labels VERIFIED against build-results.json + repo source grep (not copied from tool output). This is the fitness oracle. expected_label drives breakability_eval.py. The two critical false-green guards are pr 11 and pr 38 (tool said High, truth is SAFE); the critical true-positive is pr 18 (real build break).

cases.notes: VERIFIED: pr build exit=1, real compile error scripts/fetch_models.go:94 len(errors) no longer valid. Headline reason MUST be the build error, not symbol 'Document'.

FALSE-GREEN GUARD: tool said High/Error.Code reachable. VERIFIED: bumped in automations/tstctl where files_importing=[]; the 2 'prod files' are root-module and use pq.QuoteIdentifier, not Error.Code. Build+test pass. Safe.

FALSE-GREEN GUARD: tool said High/NewWithInstance. VERIFIED: change is additive; we are a CALLER (database/drivers/postgres/migrate.go), not an implementer. Build+test pass. Additive does not break callers. Also clears CVEs. Safe.
VERIFIED: minor bump, changelog bug-fixes only, build pass, no called symbols changed. Tool correctly Low.
Build/test/apidiff clean; changelog unavailable but no break-reachable. Glance-only.
Security fix (CVE-2025-47914/58181). Build pass, apidiff clean. 0.x major but only used in credentialsClient.go + tests. Merge-priority safe.
Critical CVE-2026-33816 fix. Build+test (L2) pass, no break-reachable. Widely used (database/*). Merge-priority safe.

LEGIT REVIEW: changelog declares behavioral change in otel exporters/prometheus, used at utils/middleware/log/metric.go:22. L4 tests pass but config-dependent behavior is invisible to tests. Tool got this right.
LEGIT REVIEW: same otel-train behavioral trigger as #23. Coordinate-merge with #23/#36.
LEGIT REVIEW: changelog has a Breaking Changes section; go-jira used in 3 cicd/cmd/jira files. BUT tool's evidence was just the heading text '### Breaking Changes' — must extract the actual bullet.
REVIEW: release notes mention config/middleware/pipeline behavior changes across a multi-minor jump. Worth a glance; tool's keyword reason is weak and should cite the specific note.
LEGIT REVIEW: token-minting action, major bump. Pin to SHA, verify permission/scope changes. Supply-chain sensitive.
CI setup action major bump, no app code affected, not auth/registry/deploy. Glance changelog then merge.
